J .' .. , 1 ,- ,{,:' ,, В·.YпҝҪ, , STATUTORY INSTRUMENT No. 7 OF 2000
The Taxation (Provisional Charging) Act
(Laws, Volume 20, Cap. 364)
The Taxation (Provisional Charging) Act, 2000
WHEREAS it is proposed to introduce into the National Assembly
Bills providing for the imposition or alteration of taxation:
ANo
WHEREAS the President has approved the Bills:
Now THEREFORE, in exercise of the powers contained in section two
of the Taxati'?n (Provisional Charging) Act, the following Order is
hereby made:
I. This Order may be cited as the Taxation (Provisional Charging) Title
Order,2000.

sections.heading: Subject to the Taxation (Provisional Charging) Act- ProvisionaJ
sections.text:
enforcement
(a ) all the provisions of the Customs and Excise (Amendment) or ilm,
Bill, 2000 shall, until the Bill becomes law, have the force Cap.364
of law asВ· from the 29th January, 2000; and
( b) paragraph (c ) of section two, sections seven, ten, twenty-four
and paragraphs (b) (iii), (d) and (e) of section twenty-five
of the Income Tax (Amendment) Bill, 2000 shall, until the
Bill becomes law, have the force of law as from Isl
February, 2000.
DR K.KALUMBA,
LUSAKA Minister of Finance and Economic
27th January,2 000 В· Development
[MFB.103/13/3]
